name: Badge
description: A small inline label for displaying status, counts, or metadata alongside other content. Use for non-interactive annotations like entry counts or status indicators.
instructions: Use variant to control color semantics (default, positive, highlight, warning, negative). Use emphasis='weak' for a subtler appearance. Provide a status prop (string color or RgbaColor object) to show a colored dot. Provide onDismiss to show a dismiss button. Use Tag instead if the label needs to be removable or interactive in a form context.
